title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits

lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller
Central Perk

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know, I'm thinking about letting Emma have her first cookie.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Her first cookie? She has cookies all the time!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I've never given her a cookie. Have you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No... and, for the record, I've also never given her a frosting from a can!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Rach, the adoption agency needs letters of recommendation and we were wondering if you would write one for us.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Of course, I'd be honored!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you!
Joey looks at them, disappointed about their decision

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: U-U-Um, I think there's been an oversight.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey, we would've asked you, we just thought you wouldn't be interested.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, it's just we don't think of you as really being so much "with the words".

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoo-weh hey weh-hey whoo hey!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Clearly we were wrong.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I gotta a lot of nice stuff to say about you guys, ok? And I know how much you wanna have a baby, you know, and I would love to help you get one.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know what? Then, Joey, we want you to do it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you! Alright, let me see how I'm gonna start... "Dear baby adoption decider people..."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So excited about your letter!
Phoebe enters

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow! Don't you look nice?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes, I do! Today is Mike and my one-year anniversary.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: OH! What's it the anniversary of? Your first date, your first kiss, first time you had sex...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: YEAH!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you must be going to somewhere fancy to celebrate?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-uh. Ehm, a Knicks game.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhm... Aren't you a little overdressed?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, you know what, I've never had a one-year anniversary before, so no matter where we go, I'm wearing something fancy pants, and... I'm gonna put on my finest jewelry and we're gonna have sex in a public rest room.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You guys do that? Chandler won't even have sex in our bathroom!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's where people make number two!!
OPENING CREDITS
Ross' apartment. Ross is grading papers. Charlie approaches him.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Hey! (They kiss and cuddle a little)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey...

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: So, you know... I have a little time. If you... if you want to...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (surprised) Oh... (he pauses) (sounds disappointed) Ohh... I'd love to but I really have to grade these papers.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Fine, it's fine... (she whispers) I'll just shower by myself...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Writing on the papers) B, B, B, B, B!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Oh, Ross, you gave a B to a Pottery Barn catalogue.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, it had some good ideas, take off your shirt.
they start kissing but someone knocks at the door

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Damnit!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (yelling from outside) Rachel!! Open up!! It's your sister!! (she knocks on the door again) I have to talk to you!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (he opens the door) Hi Amy!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You're not Rachel.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Still sharp as a tack!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Um... Charlie, this is Rachel's sister Amy. Amy, this is Charlie.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: H-Hi!!(to Ross) And you are...?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (pause) Ross? I... I grew up on your block! We had Thanksgiving together last year... I had a baby with your sister!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (looks confused) N-no... uhm... did I buy a falafel from you yesterday?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (gives up) Yes, yes, you did.
Joey and Rachel's apartment
Ross enters the apartment with Amy

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi Rachel! Here's your sister Amy! She thinks I need pec implants!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Amy! Hi! Oh-oh-hoh! (they hug) Wow! You remember Joey?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Yeah! Hey, sure! The "Days of Our Lives" guy!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's right, yeah.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You're not good!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Always nice to meet a fan!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So now, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Well, I have huge news.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Emma starts crying in the other room) Oh sorry, hold on. Let me just check on the baby!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Wait, this is important! Can Ella wait? (Rachel goes to Emma)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ehm... Her name is Emma.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Why did you change it, Ella was so much prettier!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What do I know? I just sell Middle Eastern food from a cart!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Hey, your English is getting better!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Joey) Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know, she may be the hottest girl I've ever hated.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What... what you working on?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (using a laptop) Oh, Monica and Chandler's recommendation. I want it to sound smart but.. I don't know any big words or anything, so...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why don't you use your Thesaurus?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What did I just say?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Watch. (he takes the laptop) Here, you ehm... You highlight the word you want to change.
Go under Tools and the Thesaurus generates... 'gives'... 'gives' a whole list of choices. You can pick the word that sounds smartest.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God, that's great! I'm smart!! No, no, I'm... (he uses the Thesaurus) "brainy, bright, clever", I love this thing! Look out ladies, Joey Tribbiani's got the whole package!!
Rachel's room. Rachel is attending to Emma. Amy is standing behind her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: God!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: So beautiful.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I know, isn't she?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: No, I was talking about your bedding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right. What's your news, Amy?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Oh! Um... Well... I'm getting married.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? Oh my God! To who?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: This guy! He has a killer apartment.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: A-And??

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: A-And it's on Fifth. And the elevator opens up right into the living room.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, what's he like?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Oh! He's ok. Do you remember my old boyfriend Mark?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: It's his dad.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Huh... wow, so he's gotta be...

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Old? Yeah! But he travels a lot, so he's hardly ever there.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sweety, I gotta tell ya... it sounds a little bit like you like the apartment more than you like...

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Myron. Hmm... I told you he was old!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh... sit down, sit down. Oh, honey, you know, I once also almost married somebody that I didn't love. Do you remember Barry?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Humpf, remember him? How we used to make out all the time after you went to sleep.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sometimes just nodding is ok. (pause) Uhm, so but anyway, listen, not marrying Barry was the best decision that I ever, ever made. Honey, you deserve true love. Your soulmate is out there, somewhere. Someone that is your age, that is smart, that is fun and that you care about!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (thinks about it) You're right, you're right! I'm gonna do it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I'm gonna marry Myron and keep looking for Mr Right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, let's keep talking.
Madison Square Garden. Mike and Phoebe are walking to their seats.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Excuse me, anniversary. Excuse me, anniversary. (looking at her ticket). Uhm, sir, could you move your nachos... they're in my seat. It's my anniversary. (to Mike) Here we are! (Mike nods). Can't believe it's been a whole year!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I know. This has been the best year... (the crowd starts cheering so he starts yelling) THIS HAS BEEN THE BEST YEAR OF MY LIFE!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: ME TOO! I NEVER THOUGHT I COULD LOVE SOMEONE THIS MUCH!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I FEEL THE SAME WAY!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: YOU'RE SO GENEROUS AND KIND AND (crowd stops cheering) YOU'RE AMAZING IN BED (everyone hears it and stare at them.) (to everybody) IT'S OUR ANNIVERSARY!

lines.speaker: Announcer
lines.text: Knicks fans, please turn your attention to the big screen on the score board. Someone has a special question to ask. (on the screen there's written 'Julie, will you marry me?' and goes on to show a guy kneeling down in front of a girl holding out a ring to her)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh how lame... oh, it's so tacky, and impersonal.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, it's the worst way to propose!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (looks strangely shocked) Excuse me... (he leaves, then Phoebe realizes what she did).
Monica's apartment. Joey enters the room

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, finished my recommendation. (he hands it over to Chandler) Here. And I think you'll be very, very happy. It's the longest I ever spent on a computer without looking at porn.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (reading) I don't... uh... understand.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sounding very proud of himself) Some of the words are a little too sophisticated for ya?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (also reading it) It doesn't make any sense.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Of course it does! It's smart! I used the the-saurus!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: On every word?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Alright, what was this sentence originally? (shows the sentence to Joey)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, 'They are warm, nice, people with big hearts'.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And that became 'they are humid prepossessing Homo Sapiens with full sized aortic pumps...?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, yeah and hey, I really mean it, dude.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Joey, I don't think we can use this.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, because you signed it baby kangaroo Tribbiani (Joey makes a 'and-what's-wrong-with-that' look). Hey, why don't you stop worrying about sounding smart and just be yourself!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You know what? You don't need a thesaurus, just write from here, (points at his own heart) your full sized aortic pump.
The corridor. Amy knocks Joey's door and Rachel opens the door.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Amy, hi!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I took your advice, I left Myron.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, good for you!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I know! I'm Erin Brockovich!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes you are! Oh, I am so proud of you!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Thank you! So, can I stay with you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But Erin Brockovich had her own house.
Joey comes out of Monica's apartment and sees Rachel and Amy but does not notice the huge amount of bags

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah, look who's back! (he sees the bags) Why do you have bags? RACH, WHY DOES SHE HAVE BAGS?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Well, I'm staying with you guys!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: We're gonna be roomies! (she snaps her finger and points at Joey, snaps her fingers again and points to the bags) Come on!
Joey's apartment. Rachel is in the living room and Joey comes out of his room.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You slept out here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah... Amy kept kicking me in her sleep yelling 'Myron, get off!'

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But uhm, we're getting rid of her, right? Rach, please tell me we're getting rid of her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, I can't do that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, come on! Last night I was finishing off a pizza and she said (aping Amy badly) "Uoh oh oh, a moment on the lips, forever on the hips!" I don't need that kind of talk in my house!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well Joey, uhm look, I know that she's difficult, but I think it's really good that she's here.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: 'Cause we will appreciate it more when she's gone?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, it's just... look, you know, when I first moved to the city I was a lot like her! I was spoiled, self-centered and you guys really took care of me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, Monica made us!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, uhm... whatever, I have really appreciated it, 'cause I don't think I would be the person that I am today if it wasn't for you guys. See, I wanna help Amy the way you guys helped me. And I know it's gonna take patience, but that's ok.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Good morning.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeaah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Amy, that's what I was supposed to wear today, that's why I hung it on the door.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Oh, sweety, you can't pull this off.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Amy, you know what? I was thinking that maybe now it'd be a good time for us to sit down and, you know, talk about your future.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Oh, I can't, honey. I'm gonna go get my eyebrows shaped. (points at her eyebrows) I am not happy. (to Joey who has a pizza box in his hands) Oh... sure you wanna eat that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (yelling at her) I'M CURVY, AND I LIKE IT!
Monica's Apartment. Rachel, Ross, Monica and Chandler are there, Phoebe enters the room

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi. I just had the worst anniversary ever.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I doubt that! Tell her about us last year.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, well, I bought Chandler a five hundred dollar watch and he wrote me a rap song.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Seriously?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Word!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, mine was worse than that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, what happened?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We were at the game, and this guy proposed to his girlfriend on the big screen thing...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, that is so tacky.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, that's what I said, but it turns out, Mike was planning on proposing to me that same way last night!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, Mike was gonna propose?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe, that's huge!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, do you wanna marry him?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I really do! Yes, but, after I dumped on the way he was gonna propose to me, I don't think he's ever gonna ask again! I mean, I said no in Barbados and now this!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She's right! If I were a guy and... (stops himself mid-sentence...everyone stares at him) Did I just say if I were a guy..?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Maybe you don't need him to propose to you, maybe you can propose to him!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I don't know, I don't know, isn't that a little desperate?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I proposed to Chandler! (Phoebe stops herself from laughing) Alright, moving on...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I don't think it was desperate, I think it was amazing!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Rachel and Ross) Well, do you think I should propose?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I think it could be kind of great!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Absolutely! You'll love the feeling! There's nothing like it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, ok, so how should I do it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How about at a game, on the big screen?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Sarcastically) Uuuh!! How about at a Footlocker? (claps her hands together, faking excitement)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What? what? He obviously thinks that's a nice way to be proposed to, plus he'd never suspect it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, that does make sense. Ok, now, would... would you two (points to Ross and Chandler) like that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sounds good to me... but what would a guy think?
Amy walks in carrying a phone handset

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (To Rachel) Nana is on the phone (Hands the phone over to Rachel)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Takes the phone) Oh! That's interesting, since she died seven years ago!!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: She did? Who got her condo in Boca?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Into the phone) Hello? (announces to Amy) Oh, it's our nanny! (goes back to the phone conversation) Hi! Oh... God! I hope you feel better! Ok, bye! (Hangs up) (To Ross) That's Molly, she's sick. Can you watch Emma today?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, I can't. I have back-to-back classes. Did Molly say what she had? Because my throat's been hurting?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Menstrual cramps.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't think that's what this is.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Monica, Chandler and Phoebe) Can any of you watch Emma?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, sorry sweety..

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, I've got work and then I'm proposing..

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Ross) Great, shoot, what are we gonna do?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Well, I can do it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Thinks for a moment) Well, actually...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (He interrupts her immediately, and drags her by her arm to the other side of the room) Well, can I talk to you for a sec.?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Um, I do not want her baby-sitting our child.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, for one thing, she keeps calling her Ella!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Defends Amy) Wha.. well, Ella's a nice name!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine, we'll call the next one Ella.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Shocked) Wha... the next one?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (a little confused) Okay, um... I don't want her watching our baby.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, I am trying to help her become a better person. This is a huge breakthrough for her! She just offered to do something for another human being!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I... I don't know..

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, I'm telling you, she's giving up getting her eyebrows (points at her own to emphasize the word) shaped to do this alright? Do you understand how important that is in our world?
Amy approaches from behind

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: um... listen, I couldn't help but overhear... 'cause I was trying to... Listen, let me do this alright? I really wanna help you guys out, and plus Rachel's been so wonderful to me... (looks at hem pleadingly)
Rachel looks at Ross and her agrees silently

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (very excited) Oh! Great! So how much does it pay? (Ross just gives up and leaves)
Central Perk. Joey is inside, Chandler and Monica walk in.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Joe! How's the second draft of the letter coming?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great, I'm finished! In fact, I just dropped it off at the agency.
Chandler and Monica look shocked

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You dropped it off?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Can we read it? Can you print out another copy?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No can do amigo. No, I didn't use the computer. Felt more personal to hand-write it. (Chandler and Monica look even more shocked)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You hand-wrote it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, and don't worry. I didn't try to sound smart at all! See ya later! (Leaves)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, oh my God, that letter is gonna go in our file! We're never gonna get a kid. No, we're gonna be one of those old couples that collects orchids or has a lot of birds!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's ok, it's ok. You know what? (Takes out his mobile) I'll just call the agency and tell them to throw out the letter. (starts dialing)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay good.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (on the phone) Hello, this is Chandler Bing. Somebody just dropped off a handwritten recommendation letter, and.. (listens) Uh-huh... Uh-huh... okay... thank you. Good-bye. (hangs up looking very confused).

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ugh, we're screwed, aren't we? You know what? Just tell me on the way to the bird store.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (Still looks confused) They loved it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They thought it was very smart of us to have a child write the recommendation letter.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (surprised) They thought Joey was a child?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She guessed 8, 9, based on his drawings.
Amy comes in with Emma in a stroller

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, what did you guys do today?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Ella wanted to go out, so we went shopping and got some sushi.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That sounds like fun.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Yeah, not really. Babies are dull.
Rachel comes in, sees Amy and Emma

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Emma) Hey! Hi, how's my girl?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: I'm fine! And, I got you a present for letting me stay with you. Ready?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sounds excited) Yeah!
Amy takes off Emma's hat

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Ta-daaa!
Rachel looks at Emma

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (not excited anymore) You pierced her ears!?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (Very excited about it) Doesn't it make her nose look smaller?
Rachel looks very shocked
COMMERCIAL BREAK

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You pierced her ears? How could you do this without telling me?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Well, if I had told you, then it wouldn't have been surprise, now would it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I think she looks cute. (Rachel turns around and stares at him angrily) ... but I am wrong!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God, Oh my God, here comes Ross. He's gonna flip out.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Why, did something happen to his falafel cart?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh. (takes the hat and covers Emma's head and half her face with it)
Ross enters

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey guys.

lines.speaker: Monica and Chandler
lines.text: Hi Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Emma. Oh, why is she wearing her hat so low? She can barely see. (Wants to take the hat off, but Rachel tries to stop him).

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nah, I don't really want her to see.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because there are so many terrible sights in this world.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Like war. Or that thing in Joey's refrigerator. Remember? It was in a milk carton but it looked like meat?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come here (Removes Emma's hat) Oh! There she is! Hi!
Rachel looks worried

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sees how strangely Monica, Chandler and Rachel are looking at him) What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nothing.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Back to Emma) Hi! (Looks at her) What... (Moves the stroller away from him so he can get a better look at her. He looks at her confused. Finally he realizes the difference and gasps). Please tell me those are clip-ons.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, they're real!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Did she (points at Amy) do this to her? I told you we shouldn't have left Emma with her!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know, I know, and you were right Ross. (To Amy) You are soo irresponsible I am never letting you baby-sit ever again!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Hey you know what, this kid needs me, okay? She needs to have a cool fun aunt!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm a cool, fun aunt!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (Sarcastically) O-Okay!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Monica can be cool and fun at organized indoor projects!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I can't believe this. All I wanted to do was help you try to figure out what to do with your life and this is how you repay me?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Well, I don't need you to help me, because I already know what I'm going to do with my life.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah? Since when?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Since today... I am going to be a baby stylist.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (looks at Ross and then at Amy again in disbelief) What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's not a thing!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Well, it should be. I'm gonna help babies learn how to accessorize, what colors to wear, what clothes are slimming...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shouting) Babies don't care if they're slim.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Enter Amy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (very angry) Amy, I ju... I just... I just wanna...

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: What? What are you gonna do?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (pointing at Amy, shouting) No more falafel for you!
Amy looks at Ross, angrily. Rachel clearly doesn't understand what he meant and looks at Ross who gestures "later".
Madison Square Garden. Phoebe and Mike are watching the game. There's cheering, but Phoebe seems distracted.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Great game, huh?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uhuh, uhuh... (seems distracted)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Why do you keep looking at the screen?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm not. I'm praying. (looking up) Please let the Knicks win... Thank you Thor! (Mike is standing up) Where... where are you going?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Going go to the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I think you should wait.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, if you don't... if you don't hold it in, you don't get all the nutrients.

lines.speaker: Announcer
lines.text: Knicks fans, please turn your attention to the big screen on the scoreboard. Someone has a special question to ask.
We see the screen where it says: "Mike will you marry me?" and then we see Phoebe and Mike on the screen. Phoebe stands up and kneels in front of Mike.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Mike Hannigan... will you marry me? (Mike looks bewildered)

lines.speaker: Announcer
lines.text: Get a load of this... She's proposing to him. Guess we know who wears the pants in that family. (people are laughing, while Mike still seems bewildered)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's not very enlightened!
There's booing around them, and Mike sinks in his chair, holding his hand in above his eyes, hoping no-one would recognize him

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, hey! (shouting) Boo us? Boo you!
Rachel and Joey's. Joey is in the kitchen and the telephone rings.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (picks up the phone) Hello? Yeah, this is Joey Tribbiani... Oh, hi! Well, I'm glad you liked my letter... No my mommy and daddy aren't home right now... (looks puzzled) Okay, bye bye. (hangs up) (to himself) She was nice!
Rachel and Amy enter

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, get Amy's bags, she is moving out!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoo-hoo! (and leaves for Rachel's room)

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You're kicking me out?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You put holes in my baby's ears!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Yeah well, at least now people will know she is a girl!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (gasps) I can't believe I ever even tried to help you. You are so beyond help.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You know what? Ever since I got here, you have been nothing but negative.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You didn't want me to marry the old guy with the great apartment. Then, I tried to help your daughter to de-emphasize her flaws (frantically pointing at her nose) And suddenly I am the bad guy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (yelling) Joey, where are those bags?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Yelling from Rachel's room) She has a lot of crap!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You know what? When I moved in here I thought: This is gonna be so great. Just us sisters, back together again like when we were kids, except without that stupid Jill... Oh! Who has gotten fat by the way...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (doesn't believe what she's hearing) Seriously?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: hm-mmm... Mom said she gained like fifteen pounds.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hips or thighs?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Ass and face.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (gasps) Oh! Oh my God! I thought she was on Atkins.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: She was. Carbs found her... See, this is what I wanted. Two sisters, talking about real stuff.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (embarrassed) Oh, I can give you that.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You can?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. I just, I kept trying to make you a better person, but you're... you're already a pretty perfect version of what you are.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: (touched) Thank you. I've got to admit, Emma does look cute.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Did you just say Emma?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Ugh, I'm sorry... Ella.
Mike and Phoebe at a restaurant.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That woman at the game didn't know what she was talking about. Mike, obviously you have balls.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: But please, let's just forget the whole thing.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (the waiter puts a piece of cake on the table) I would love it. Consider it forgotten... But just so you know... however and whenever you decide to propose, I promise I'll say yes. Whether... whether, you know, it is in a basketball game, or in sky writing, or you know, like some lame guy in a cheesy movie who hides it in the cake.
Mike's face changes from happy to sad, and he looks at the cake, disappointed.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's in the cake, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (puts on a fake smile) Where else would lame Mr. No Balls hide it? (he takes the ring from the cake, and cleans it with a napkin)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What's the matter with me? How do I keep ruining this? I'm sorry, I'm sorry!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: No! It's my fault. I keep trying to propose in these stupid ways and all I wanna do is tell you that I love you and I want to spend the rest of my life with you.
Phoebe has this weird, anxious, nervous look on her face

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I'm gonna do this now.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God!
Mike starts to kneel in front of Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe, I...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wait! Oh wait! (she takes off a ring that was already on her left ring finger. After that Mike starts to kneel again, but then...) Oh no! (She was wearing rings on all her fingers and her thumb, and takes all of these off.)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Ready?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh! (and now Mike kneels properly)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe, I love you. There's no-one else in the world I would ask to marry me... three times. But I wanna take care of you, have babies with you, and grow old with you... Phoebe Buffay, will you marry me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes!
Mike puts the ring on her finger

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I love you!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I love you more!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Not possible! (they kiss, and then Mike says proudly...) She's gonna be Mrs. No Balls.
They kiss again, and Phoebe looks at the ring.
COMMERCIAL BREAK
The street in front of Central Perk. Rachel and Amy are walking on the sidewalk.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So how is the uhm... baby styling business going?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Not that great. It's almost if people don't want to hear that their babies are ugly.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's shocking!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Oh! It's Ross... Hey Ross! (She says hey to the guy at the falafel stand, whose only similarity with Ross would be his black hair.) Hello-oo Ross! (to Rachel) He's rude!
THE END
